news.title:
HUL, GCPL, Tata Consumer hit 52-week lows as BSE FMCG index fell 2% intraday.
Crude price surge pressures FMCG margins; analysts foresee cost hikes, volume impact.
news.summary:
HUL, GCPL, Tata Consumer hit 52-week lows as BSE FMCG index fell 2% intraday.
Crude price surge pressures FMCG margins; analysts foresee cost hikes, volume impact.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products fell 1.02%, closing at Rs.1,017.15 on March 20, 2026.
The stock underperformed Sensex, which declined 0.28%, amid sectoral pressures and bearish markets.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products fell 1.02%, closing at Rs.1,017.15 on March 20, 2026.
The stock underperformed Sensex, which declined 0.28%, amid sectoral pressures and bearish markets.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products appoints M. Pradeep Kumar as Chief Customer Officer, effective April 1, 2026.
Pradeep Kumar will oversee India Sales, SAARC, GCPL International, and global sales capabilities development.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products appoints M. Pradeep Kumar as Chief Customer Officer, effective April 1, 2026.
Pradeep Kumar will oversee India Sales, SAARC, GCPL International, and global sales capabilities development.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Godrej Consumer with TP Rs 1,425, citing overdone margin concerns.
India shows high single-digit volume growth, Indonesia business recovery anticipated.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Godrej Consumer with TP Rs 1,425, citing overdone margin concerns.
India shows high single-digit volume growth, Indonesia business recovery anticipated.

news.title: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd. sees block trade of ₹112.7 Cr for 1,002,737 shares at ₹1,124.3 each.
news.summary: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd. sees block trade of ₹112.7 Cr for 1,002,737 shares at ₹1,124.3 each.

news.title:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.
news.summary:
CLSA warns Asian Paints, HUL, and Godrej Consumer may need steep price hikes if crude stays high.
ITC, Nestlé India, and Colgate India may require smaller hikes; high crude costs could pressure margins.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley downgrades GCPL to Equal Weight, cuts target to Rs 1159.
Previous target price for GCPL was Rs 1315, now reduced.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley downgrades GCPL to Equal Weight, cuts target to Rs 1159.
Previous target price for GCPL was Rs 1315, now reduced.

news.title:
FMCG majors like Dabur, Godrej Consumer, Bajaj Consumer, and Amul plan 10-15% ad spend hike as margins improve.
Lower commodity costs and benign inflation to boost operating margins and support sales-driven strategies.
news.summary:
FMCG majors like Dabur, Godrej Consumer, Bajaj Consumer, and Amul plan 10-15% ad spend hike as margins improve.
Lower commodity costs and benign inflation to boost operating margins and support sales-driven strategies.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd informs about upcoming analyst/investor meetings in February 2026.
Meetings include conferences with Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL, with possible presentations shared on exchange websites.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd informs about upcoming analyst/investor meetings in February 2026.
Meetings include conferences with Nuvama, Axis Capital, Kotak, and IIFL, with possible presentations shared on exchange websites.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products reported 9% revenue growth; EBITDA margin at 21.6%.
India business saw 9% volume growth, 24.8% EBITDA margin; acquired Muuchstac.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products reported 9% revenue growth; EBITDA margin at 21.6%.
India business saw 9% volume growth, 24.8% EBITDA margin; acquired Muuchstac.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products sees demand recovery, driven by soaps post-GST changes and stabilizing oil prices, aiming for improved growth in FY27.
Q3FY26 revenue stood at ₹4,099 crore with 21.5% margin. Expansion in household insecticides and liquid detergents boosts growth.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products sees demand recovery, driven by soaps post-GST changes and stabilizing oil prices, aiming for improved growth in FY27.
Q3FY26 revenue stood at ₹4,099 crore with 21.5% margin. Expansion in household insecticides and liquid detergents boosts growth.

news.title:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.
news.summary:
JSW Energy and Godrej Consumer Products shares plunged 10% post-Q3 results, while India Cements rose 5%.
JSW Energy's profit grew 150% YoY, but missed estimates; Godrej Consumer's net profit declined; India Cements showed operational improvements.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer's Q3 profit dipped to INR 4.98B due to Indonesia weakness, labour codes.
Net profit marginally fell from INR 4.98B YoY, impacted by one-time charges.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer's Q3 profit dipped to INR 4.98B due to Indonesia weakness, labour codes.
Net profit marginally fell from INR 4.98B YoY, impacted by one-time charges.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Godrej Consumer with a target of 1,291.
The rating is based on consistent growth and stable margins.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Godrej Consumer with a target of 1,291.
The rating is based on consistent growth and stable margins.

news.title:
Persistent Systems, Wipro, SRF, Coforge, GCPL to trade ex-dividend next week with payouts ranging from Rs 4 to Rs 22.
Other firms like United Spirits, KEI Industries, and Zensar among others also declare dividends with varying record dates.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems, Wipro, SRF, Coforge, GCPL to trade ex-dividend next week with payouts ranging from Rs 4 to Rs 22.
Other firms like United Spirits, KEI Industries, and Zensar among others also declare dividends with varying record dates.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer declares Rs. 5 interim dividend for FY25-26, taxable with TDS.
Shareholders must update PAN by Jan 30, 2026; TDS rates vary for residents/non-residents.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer declares Rs. 5 interim dividend for FY25-26, taxable with TDS.
Shareholders must update PAN by Jan 30, 2026; TDS rates vary for residents/non-residents.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products held an investor and analyst call on Jan 23, 2026.
The audio recording of the call is accessible on the company's website.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products held an investor and analyst call on Jan 23, 2026.
The audio recording of the call is accessible on the company's website.

news.title:
GCPL's Q3 net profit fell marginally to Rs 498 cr; sales rose 9% YoY to Rs 4,079.5 cr.
India sales grew 11%, Indonesia revenue fell 2.8%, and Africa surged 19.4%; Rs 5/share interim dividend declared.
news.summary:
GCPL's Q3 net profit fell marginally to Rs 498 cr; sales rose 9% YoY to Rs 4,079.5 cr.
India sales grew 11%, Indonesia revenue fell 2.8%, and Africa surged 19.4%; Rs 5/share interim dividend declared.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products reports 9% YoY consolidated revenue growth; standalone organic sales grew 11%.
Regional sales mixed: Indonesia down 3%, Africa/USA/Middle East up 19%; net profit up 14% excluding one-offs.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products reports 9% YoY consolidated revenue growth; standalone organic sales grew 11%.
Regional sales mixed: Indonesia down 3%, Africa/USA/Middle East up 19%; net profit up 14% excluding one-offs.

news.title:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd approved unaudited Q3 FY26 results, showing consolidated revenue of ₹4,079.47 crore and PAT of ₹497.91 crore.
The board declared an interim dividend of ₹5/share, with record date January 30, 2026, and payment by February 22, 2026.
news.summary:
Godrej Consumer Products Ltd approved unaudited Q3 FY26 results, showing consolidated revenue of ₹4,079.47 crore and PAT of ₹497.91 crore.
The board declared an interim dividend of ₹5/share, with record date January 30, 2026, and payment by February 22, 2026.
